tasks.title: Author docs/billing/endpoint-gate-matrix.md (every protected/admin route)
tasks.description: Spec T-145-01. Walk every route under apps/api/src/routes/**/protected/** and gated admin/**; for each: decided EntitlementKey/LimitKey or 'no gate needed' + reason. Seed with the spec's audit candidates (publish/edit accommodations, create-promotions, write-reviews, advanced/basic stats, gallery photos). Include 'reserved — route pending' section for phantom gates and 'reserved' limit stubs (MAX_PROPERTIES/MAX_STAFF_ACCOUNTS). This doc drives T-004..T-009, T-011 and the T-022 snapshot guard — format it machine-checkable (one table, stable route-path keys).

tasks.title: Unify gate error contract to ServiceError (INV-2)
tasks.description: Spec T-145-02 (narrowed by realign). Refactor the 12 phantom gates (tourist-entitlements.ts:109-534, accommodation-entitlements.ts:238-368+) plus requireEntitlement (entitlement.ts:704) and requireLimit (entitlement.ts:759,768) from HTTPException(403, JSON.stringify(...)) to ServiceError(ENTITLEMENT_REQUIRED | LIMIT_REACHED) with proper code/message/details — matching the 3 live gates already on Pattern A. Verify onError mapping (response.ts:286-310). Update entitlement.test.ts assertions (it covers all gates).

tasks.title: Remove residual as-EntitlementKey/LimitKey casts (ADR-021)
tasks.description: Spec T-145-23 (absorbed SPEC-192 residue). Remove the 6+ casts in entitlement.ts (~lines 323,409,415,429,435) and the rest across apps/api/src (~11 total — grep first). Replace with proper narrowing/validation per ADR-021. No behavior change; typecheck is the gate.

tasks.title: Wire accommodation entitlement gates (publish + edit)
tasks.description: Spec T-145-03 (accommodation slice). Per matrix: PUBLISH_ACCOMMODATIONS on create/createDraft/host-onboarding-start (on top of existing enforceAccommodationLimit), EDIT_ACCOMMODATION_INFO on update/patch (alongside existing gateRichDescription/gateVideoEmbed). Follow the existing wired-gate pattern exactly. Unit tests per route (mocked middleware level).

tasks.title: Wire promotion + review entitlement gates
tasks.description: Spec T-145-03 (promotions/reviews slice). Per matrix: CREATE_PROMOTIONS on owner-promotion create/update/patch (on top of enforcePromotionLimit), WRITE_REVIEWS on accommodation + destination review create. Unit tests per route.

tasks.title: Wire stats + gallery gates
tasks.description: Spec T-145-03 (stats slice). Per matrix: VIEW_ADVANCED_STATS on hostFavoritesBreakdown + hostMarketComparison; VIEW_BASIC_STATS on conversations response-rate + monthly-inquiries; MAX_PHOTOS_PER_ACCOMMODATION on protected gallery media upload (mirror the admin upload inline pattern at media/admin/upload.ts:371-435). Unit tests per route. [T-001 finding: media/protected/upload.ts ALREADY has the inline MAX_PHOTOS check — verify before re-adding; T-006 scope may shrink to stats gates only.]

tasks.title: Resolve MAX_PROPERTIES / MAX_STAFF_ACCOUNTS stub counters
tasks.description: Spec T-145-04. limit-enforcement.ts:619,725 hardcode currentCount=0. Per matrix decision: wire the real count if the owning service exists, else register both as 'reserved' in the matrix so the snapshot guard treats them as known (no silent never-triggering limit). Document in code comment + matrix.

tasks.title: Favorites gate matrix decisions (list/delete/update/collections)
tasks.description: Spec T-145-05. Matrix decision per favorites-adjacent route; removal MUST stay ungated (BETA-42: users at cap can still remove). Wire whatever the matrix decides + tests.

tasks.title: Document phantom gates as intentional dead code
tasks.description: Spec T-145-06 (owner decision: keep, do NOT delete, do NOT build routes). Add '// PHANTOM-GATE (SPEC-145): route not built yet, see endpoint-gate-matrix.md' to the 12 phantom gates; register each in the matrix under 'reserved — route pending'; except them in the T-022 snapshot guard.

tasks.title: Staff bypass JSDoc + e2e (INV-6)
tasks.description: Spec T-145-07 + T-145-16. JSDoc the bypass on each gateXxx and requireEntitlement; e2e: staff actor passes a gate a tourist-free actor fails (use the seeded dev users / createMockAdminActor patterns; real route through full middleware stack).

tasks.title: Build admin customer-entitlement grant/revoke route pair
tasks.description: Spec T-145-12 route half (expanded by realign — route does not exist). Minimal admin route pair under billing/admin (e.g. customer-entitlements.ts): POST grant + DELETE revoke a one-off customer entitlement via billing.entitlements, PermissionEnum-gated (pick the right enum per existing billing admin routes), calling clearEntitlementCache(customerId) on both. createAdminRoute factory + ResponseFactory + schemas from @repo/schemas. Unit tests.

subtasks.title: Grant + revoke routes with cache clear

tasks.title: E2e block tests: 403 ENTITLEMENT_REQUIRED per wired gate
tasks.description: Spec T-145-08. One block test per wired gate (publish, edit, promotions, reviews, advanced/basic stats, photos): user whose plan lacks the entitlement → 403 with code ENTITLEMENT_REQUIRED, correct body shape (post T-002 contract), NO DB mutation. SPEC-143 patterns: billing-factories, withRollback, real production routes through full middleware stack.

tasks.title: E2e allow tests: 2xx + side effect under granting plan
tasks.description: Spec T-145-09. Same routes as T-012 under a plan that grants the entitlement → 2xx and the side effect lands in DB. Pair each with its block test (same file).

tasks.title: E2e limit tests: N+1 hits LIMIT_REACHED over real routes
tasks.description: Spec T-145-10. N+1 attempts where the (N+1)th hits MAX_* → 403 LIMIT_REACHED with currentCount/maxAllowed/remaining details (post T-002 contract). Cover: accommodations, promotions, favorites, photos.

tasks.title: E2e plan-change elevation/restriction
tasks.description: Spec T-145-11. Post-upgrade: previously-blocked route → 2xx immediately (no TTL wait — cache cleared by lifecycle). Post-downgrade (scheduled + cron apply, per 167 policy): premium route → 403. Use the apply-scheduled-plan-changes flow from SPEC-194 (now idempotent).

tasks.title: E2e admin override: grant → 2xx, revoke → 403 immediately
tasks.description: Spec T-145-12 e2e half. Against the T-011 routes: admin grants a one-off entitlement → gated route 2xx; admin revokes → 403 immediately (cache invalidation proven).

tasks.title: E2e addon limit elevation
tasks.description: Spec T-145-13. Cheap plan MAX_ACCOMMODATIONS=1 + extra-accommodations-5 addon → allows up to 6 over the real create route; after addon-expiry cron → back to 1 (next create → LIMIT_REACHED). Data plumbing verified working (checkout writes billing_customer_limits; middleware overrides plan limits).

tasks.title: E2e refund/cancellation revocation at route level
tasks.description: Spec T-145-14 (behavior exists via SPEC-194 refund-lifecycle.service). Assert the ROUTE-level effect: full refund → previously-allowed premium route now 403; cancellation same. Drive via the established webhook/admin-hook e2e patterns.

tasks.title: E2e trial grant/expiry at route level
tasks.description: Spec T-145-15. Trial start grants the trialed plan's entitlements at route level (2xx on premium route); trial expiry (blockExpiredTrials — SPEC-194-restructured) revokes (403). Use trial-lifecycle e2e file patterns.

tasks.title: Stale-cache regression guard (INV-1)
tasks.description: Spec T-145-17. Pre-populate cache, mutate sub state in DB WITHOUT clearEntitlementCache → assert the gated route serves stale (test documents the failure mode); add the clear → passes. This is the canary proving cache invalidation matters.

tasks.title: Transversal cache-invalidation test (INV-1 master guard)
tasks.description: Spec T-145-18. Enumerate every money-mutating event (activation, upgrade, downgrade-cron, cancel, pause, resume, addon purchase/expiry/cancel, trial start/expire, refund, dunning-cancel, admin grant/revoke) and assert each calls clearEntitlementCache. Drift report found ~24 existing call sites incl. SPEC-194's refund (4 sites) + dunning (:318) — the test pins the full set. Admin grant/revoke sites come from T-011. [LIVE GAP found by T-017: addonExpiryJob expiry path does NOT call clearEntitlementCache (DB limit drops, cache stays stale until TTL) — FIX it in this task (one-line + test in the cron) so the transversal test passes honestly; T-017 e2e currently clears manually with a documented note — update that test after the fix.]

tasks.title: Route snapshot guard test (CI gate)
tasks.description: Spec T-145-19. Walk every registered route; any routes/**/protected/** or gated admin/** route must appear in endpoint-gate-matrix.md (gate or justified 'no gate needed'); phantom/reserved excepted explicitly. Fails CI when a new protected route lands without a matrix entry. Parse the matrix table (machine-checkable format from T-001).

tasks.title: Contributor doc: adding-an-entitlement.md
tasks.description: Spec T-145-20. docs/billing/adding-an-entitlement.md: enum (192 catalog) → seed/plan config → gate the route → block+allow e2e → matrix entry. Concise, linked from billing docs index.

tasks.title: Update CLAUDE.md files with the enforcement model
tasks.description: Spec T-145-21. apps/api/CLAUDE.md + packages/billing/CLAUDE.md: middleware chain order, unified error contract, admin/staff bypass, clearEntitlementCache invariant, phantom/reserved-key concept. Separate commit (docs).

tasks.title: Chunked coverage: 100% functional on the 4 enforcement files
tasks.description: Spec T-145-22. entitlement.ts, tourist-entitlements.ts, accommodation-entitlements.ts, limit-enforcement.ts — chunked coverage per SPEC-143 (full --coverage OOMs, engram #636). Note: tourist/accommodation have no standalone test files (covered in entitlement.test.ts). Fill gaps found.

tasks.title: Post-change mock sweep + per-package typechecks
tasks.description: Mandatory sweep (SPEC-192/127/194 precedent): grep ALL test files mocking touched modules (entitlement, tourist-entitlements, accommodation-entitlements, limit-enforcement, the gated route modules, the new admin customer-entitlements route). Fix stale enumerated vi.mock factories. Targeted sequential runs only. Typecheck apps/api + packages touched.

tasks.title: Quality gate + adversarial fresh-context review
tasks.description: Per-package typecheck, lint, targeted suites sequential (owner constraints). Adversarial review of the full diff (enforcement = security-adjacent: hunt for gates that fail open, bypass paths, ServiceError leaking internals, e2e asserting mocks instead of behavior). Fix round on confirmed findings. [E2E findings for review: (1) test DB in worktree lacked SPEC-166 moderation_state columns — check test-DB provisioning; (2) PATCH /accommodations/:id with unknown UUID returns 500 not 404 — possible pre-existing bug, flag in PR.]

tasks.title: Register deferred smoke sections + docs
tasks.description: Add SPEC-145's deferred staging-smoke sections (fresh cheap-plan user: 403 on expensive-only, 2xx on included — per spec DoD) to the SPEC-193 pending-staging-smoke.md list. Tracking commits separate from code.

tasks.title: PR to staging, CI green, merge, closeout
tasks.description: Orphan-commit guard; push with remote-ref verification (rtk silent no-op gotcha); resync staging early if behind. PR notes: new gates list (behavior change: previously-open routes now 403 for under-plan users — flag for review), error-contract unification, new admin route, snapshot guard. Merge only on CI Pass SUCCESS. Closeout: index-sync + engram.
